name: Staff of Nature's Vengeance (Greater)
description:
This stout staff is made from gnarled hawthorn. When used as a weapon, a staff of nature's vengeance permanently has the effects of Shillelagh.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

Cantrip Tangle Vine
1st Shocking Grasp, Spider Sting
2nd Floating Flame, Vomit Swarm
3rd Earthbind, Wall of Thorns
4th Bestial Curse, Spike Stones
5th Toxic Cloud, Control Water
6th Purple Worm Sting, Tangling Creepers

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells, plus one casting of shillelagh.
